Each project is assigned to its highest qualifying tier each month. L3 is CI/CD-embedded or full-feature AI; L2 is AI for development; L1 is research-only; L0 is no AI; TBD are projects pending classification.

title: AI Adoption Trends
text:
Project AI maturity by tier

Each project is assigned to its highest qualifying tier each month. L3 is CI/CD-embedded or full-feature AI; L2 is AI for development; L1 is research-only; L0 is no AI; TBD are projects pending classification.

Project performance by AI tier

Mean overall_rating per AI tier, over time. Climbing lines on L2/L3 vs flat L0 lines support the “AI is helping delivery” story; divergence the other way is worth investigating.

title: AI Adoption Trends
text:
Project performance by AI tier

Mean overall_rating per AI tier, over time. Climbing lines on L2/L3 vs flat L0 lines support the “AI is helping delivery” story; divergence the other way is worth investigating.
